name: Lasagna Rolls with Tomato-Fennel
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 1/2 Oz.) Pkg. Firm Tofu Drained & Crumbled
1 (14 1/2 Oz.) Can Whole Tomatoes Undrained & Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with spray. Place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add garlic; sauté 2 minutes.
3. Add mushrooms, diced red pepper, thyme, salt, and black pepper. Cook over high heat for 8 minutes or until liquid evaporates, stirring constantly.
4. Combine mushroom mixture and tofu in a medium bowl. Stir well and set aside.
5. Wipe pan dry with a paper towel; coat with cooking spray.
6. Place over medium-high heat until hot. Add green onions and sauté 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add fennel bulb, fennel seeds, black pepper, and salt. Cook for an additional 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
8. Add tomatoes and tomato paste; cook another 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
9. Spread 1 cup of tomato mixture over the bottom of an 8-inch square baking dish.
10. Spread 1/3 cup of mushroom mixture over each noodle.
11. Sprinkle each with 3 tablespoons of cheese.
12. Roll up in a jellyroll fashion, beginning at the narrow end.
13. Arrange rolls, seam side down, in the tomato mixture in the baking dish.
14. Spoon remaining 1 1/2 cups of tomato mixture over the rolls.
15. Cover and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Uncover and bake an additional 10 minutes (Chol. 6, Pro. 13, Fat 7.2, Carb. 29.8, Sodium 205, Calcium 142)
